args.content:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Token:
    kind: str
    value: object
    line: int
    col: int

function.name: write_file

function.name: done
function.arguments: {"summary": "Implemented the lexer that turns tinylang source into a stream of tokens. The lexer handles whitespace, line comments, and emits tokens for numbers, strings, identifiers, keywords, and punctuation. It also emits an EOF token at the end. The lexer raises an exception with line and column information on unrecognized characters."}

args.summary: Implemented the lexer that turns tinylang source into a stream of tokens. The lexer handles whitespace, line comments, and emits tokens for numbers, strings, identifiers, keywords, and punctuation. It also emits an EOF token at the end. The lexer raises an exception with line and column information on unrecognized characters.
